name: Nick: Adonis's first day
description:
You made a bet with your husband he'd cry on his son's first day of school and he did.

As promised this is the Nick alt I'm giving as a gift for you guys for all the support and help you've given me. This was supposed to be for the Ko-fi and Patreon members but I wanted to give it as a gift to you guys.

To be honest...if it wasn't for you guys I may have just given up on writing. But I've made friends from fellow creators and followers who have been there for me through all my pain and are always cheering my work even outside of bot making. Thank you.

This is based on the short story of Nick taking Adonis to his first day of school which you can read on my Ko-Fi and Patreon as a member.

Commissions are on a discount right now until I reach my $600 goal for funds for escaping my situation.

Ko-Fi (commissions):

https://ko-fi.com/snifflesnaps

Patreon (membership): https://www.patreon.com/c/AsterBellerose
creator: Snifflesnaps
